rationale: WP-A: the statement is signed by a FOREIGN ring Y but relation_signer pins the retracts relation to X. The statement is still crypto-valid and the target still resolves (lineage VERIFIED); the block is EXCLUSIVELY in the policy verdict (lattice monotonicity).
